title: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' kicks off summer movie season in style with $77 million opening
summary_full: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the summer movie season with $77 million in ticket sales.
summary_public: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the summer movie season with $77 million in ticket sales.
